name: Red, White and Blue Berry Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 pint Fresh or frozen unsweetened berries
1 pint Fresh or frozen unsweetened berries
recipeInstructions: In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, cornstarch and water. Cook and stir until thick and clear. Stir in gelatin until dissolved. Divide mixture into two halves. Stir blueberries and lemon juice into one half; spread in the bottom of the pie crust. Chill until set. Gently fold raspberries into remaining gelatin; set aside at room temperature. In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese and confectioner's sugar until smooth. Fold in whipped topping; spread over blueberry layer. Chill until set, about 2 hours. Carefully spread raspberry mixture over cream cheese layer. Chill for at least 4 hours.
